settings.text:
Maxfoot MF-19, breaking boundaries in folding ebikes configuration.


The MF-19 boasts a robust 1000-watt hub-motor, making it a performance beast. This powerhouse can be effortlessly folded in just 3 steps. With advanced six-bar linkage rear suspension for a smooth ride and Maxfoot signature fat tires, this foldable bike adapts to all terrains.


The MF-19 embodies both portability and high-performance, setting the new standard for folding ebikes.

Bafang 1000W Motor

The high-speed continuous 1000W (peaking to 1350W) brushless geared hub motor with 90 Nm of max torque, which gives you a maximum power and be unstoppable on bad terrains. We’d love to let you feel the passion and enjoy the pleasure of cycling!

settings.text:
Rear Suspension
The powerful six-bar linkage rear suspension is a unique technology of Maxfoot. With the use of the six-bar linkage rear suspension and the front fork suspension, you will only feel extremely comfortable when riding

Quick Folding
The folding Hinge simplifies the unlocking mechanism as much as possible while preventing accidental unlocking and ensuring safety. It is solid and secure after locking, and very simple when you need to unlock it.

Integrated Headlight
The headlight powered by the main battery pack, so you dont need to pay attention to the power of the headlights while paying attention to the power of the bicycle itself. Also Its illumination angle can be easily adjusted based on the needs of riders.

Multi-Mode Tail Light
Tail light powered by the main battery of the bike. It comes with 3 working modes: Steady, Flash and Highlight. This multifunctional tail light is one of the safety guarantees for riders when riding.

Bafang Motor
With 1000W at your disposal, this Bafang brushless geared hub Motor is what is going to help power you up steep inclines and get you up to top speed quickly from a dead stop, all while remaining quiet and inconspicuous.

Large Capacity Battery
The large-capacity battery from Panasonic provides strong energy support for the MF-19's riding range. With PAS system, the riding range can even reach an amazing 60 miles. You just have to ride and don’t need to worry about battery range.

settings.bicycleTabs_contentDesc: As an all-terrain e-bike,MF-19 equipped with a six-bar linkage rear suspension for maximum shock absorption. This advanced suspension system provides optimal control and comfort for any level of rider, no matter the terrain. Enjoy a smooth ride on your next mountain adventure!

The headlight is powered by the main battery pack, so you do not have to pay attention to the headlights' power while monitoring the bicycle's power. Additionally, the illumination angle can be adjusted according to the rider's needs.
Tail light is powered by the main battery. It switches between 3 working modes: Steady, Flash and Highlight. This multifunctional tail light is a necessary guarantee for rider.

The SAMSUNG‘s large-capacity battery provides strong energy support for riding range. With PAS system, this range can even reach an amazing 60 miles. Just ride and have no need to worry about battery status.

settings.title: Rear Suspension
settings.text: As an all-terrain e-bike,MF-19 equipped with a six-bar linkage rear suspension for maximum shock absorption. This advanced suspension system provides optimal control and comfort for any level of rider, no matter the terrain. Enjoy a smooth ride on your next mountain adventure!

settings.title: Quick Folding
settings.text: Discover the joy of effortless riding with the Maxfoot MF-19 E-bike! Its 3-step folding design make it easy to take anywhere. Enjoy the freedom of an electric bike without breaking a sweat. Where will you explore with your Maxfoot?

settings.title: Integrated Headlight
settings.text: The headlight is powered by the main battery pack, so you do not have to pay attention to the headlights' power while monitoring the bicycle's power. Additionally, the illumination angle can be adjusted according to the rider's needs.

settings.title: Multi-Mode Tail Light
settings.text: Tail light is powered by the main battery. It switches between 3 working modes: Steady, Flash and Highlight. This multifunctional tail light is a necessary guarantee for rider.

settings.title: Bafang Motor
settings.text: Maxfoot MF-19 E-bike offers superior performance with its 1000W motor, delivering 90N.m of torque for a smooth and powerful ride. This powerful motor is equal to that of its 1200W counterparts, providing plenty of power for expanded range and speed.

settings.title: Large Capacity Battery
settings.text: The SAMSUNG‘s large-capacity battery provides strong energy support for riding range. With PAS system, this range can even reach an amazing 60 miles. Just ride and have no need to worry about battery status.
